paper.title: Human-in-the-Loop Nugget Annotation for Accountable LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluations

paper_linked_artifacts.description: Paper footnote 1 web demo. The retrieved self-contained HTML includes the annotation interface, embedded demonstration data and nugget banks, export logic, canonicalization and matching prompts, and an OpenRouter client call. It is a mutable web artifact, not an immutable paper-version attachment.

queries_and_surfaces: Exact paper title plus Laura Dietz plus code/demo/dataset/GitHub via web search
arXiv ID 2606.29033 plus Laura Dietz plus GitHub via web search
GitHub repository search for the exact title and arXiv ID
Laura Dietz public GitHub repository inventory (60 repositories returned by the user-repositories API)
artifact_search.result: No exact-title- or arXiv-linked code, data, annotation-tool, prompt, or judge repository was found beyond the paper-linked mutable web demo. Adjacent nugget/autojudge repositories in the author's public inventory were not treated as paper release evidence because the paper does not link them and the exact searches did not establish implementation identity.
artifact_search.claim_boundary: This records bounded public searches on one date; it does not prove that no private, renamed, future, or unindexed artifact exists.

scope_note: Deep review completed from the immutable v2 paper and the captured paper-linked demo. The demo is a mutable artifact whose Last-Modified timestamp predates v2, but no commit or paper-time hash establishes exact experiment identity. The review audits behavior and release inspectability; it does not validate reduced anchoring, expert authority, bank completeness, matching accuracy, scalability, professional validity, or readiness.
